stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Determine the total moment at landing in the following conditions:

Basic empty mass: 3 210 lb
One pilot: 160 lb
Front seat passenger: 200 lb
Centre seat passengers: 290 lb (total)
One passenger rear seat: 110 lb
Baggage in zone 1: 100 lb
Baggage in zone 4: 50 lb
Block fuel: 100 US Gal.
Trip fuel: 55 US Gal.
Fuel for start up and taxi: 3 US Gal.
Fuel density: 6 lb/US Gal.
Total moment at take-off: 432 226 lb in
